'''Duncan Fegredo''' was a storyboard artist for the film ''[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]''.<ref name="Credits">''[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]''</ref> He also produced cover art for multiple ''Star Wars'' comics.

{{Artist-stub}}
